race.comment: Competitive. IONACELTIC (3) resumes for the Currie yard and would have decent claims if presented forward this time around. Will race over further, but has trialled well enough, and Jones is a key jockey engagement. The betting will be key. Stablemate STREAK OF WINNING (1), likely had excuses at Eagle Farm, but had gone close at Doomben and the Sunshine Coast prior. Those efforts stack up for this, and he jumps from an inside barrier. Loses Jones, but Butler is a positive replacement. BETTERLUCKNEXTTIME (7) just missed at Doomben two back at big odds and has been freshened after disappointing there following. Has been kept up to the mark with a trial and is good enough to feature in this company. THATS ARCHIES GIRL (9) got too far back at Doomben but had placed in decent races the two before. Returns to her home track this time and has to be considered as well.
